Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn The Red Nightmare Crimson Jewel Item Level: 83 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 1 4% increased Area of Effect Gain 6% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage {mutated}Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius also grant Fire Damage Converted to Chaos Damage at 100% of its value Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn The Green Nightmare Viridian Jewel Item Level: 84 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 1 Damage Penetrates 1% Fire Resistance Gain 6% of Cold Damage as Extra Chaos Damage {mutated}Passives granting Cold Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius also grant Cold Damage Converted to Chaos Damage at 100% of its value Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Damnation Splinter Medium Cluster Jewel Unique ID: 40c014072eee501a3b48787d2a848a744f03573d2425334e7d2d2474acc43d51 Item Level: 77 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 4 {crafted}Adds 5 Passive Skills {crafted}1 Added Passive Skill is a Jewel Socket {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Trap Damage Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Mine Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +5 to Dexterity Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +5% to Fire Resistance 1 Added Passive Skill is Guerilla Tactics 1 Added Passive Skill is Surprise Sabotage

Rarity: UNIQUE Pyre Sapphire Ring Catalyst: Prismatic CatalystQuality: 20 Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.0.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 LevelReq: 11 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.841}+(20-30)% to Cold Resistance {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.866}+(25-35)% to Fire Resistance {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:1,2}{range:0.5}(25-35)% increased Burning Damage {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:3}{range:0.5}(60-80)% increased Burning Damage {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:1}100% of Cold Damage Converted to Fire Damage {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:2,3}40% of Cold Damage Converted to Fire Damage 10% increased Light Radius Ignited Enemies you hit are destroyed on Kill
Rarity: UNIQUE Kalandra's Touch Ring League: Kalandra Implicits: 0 Reflects your opposite Ring Mirrored
